name: @hypabolic/pi-hypa
description_en: Pi extension that keeps noisy tool output out of your context window. Automatically rewrites shell commands through Hypa for local, deterministic compression, context-aware file tools, and recoverable evidence.
description_zh: Pi 扩展，将嘈杂的工具输出排除在上下文窗口之外。通过 Hypa 自动重写 shell 命令，实现本地确定性压缩、上下文感知文件工具和可恢复证据。
